description: Canonical 99-tool cognitive topology. Tier order is cognitive sequence, not departmental. All tools require F1-F13 floor verification before execution. Tool calls require stage-gate ordering per pipeline.

routing_rules: No T05 tool callable without T00 judgment (arifos_judge = SEAL)
No T03 economic projection without T01 data ingestion
No T02 geological evaluation without T01 reality grounding
All irreversible actions require: SEAL + omega >= 0.95 + all Floors pass + human_approved = true
Vault closure (Stage 999) is mandatory — no session ends without Merkle record

shadow_defense.pattern_P1: Vocabulary without structure — SEAL used but no telemetry JSON
shadow_defense.pattern_P2: Pipeline shortcut — Stage 777 without Stage 666 completion
shadow_defense.pattern_P3: Verdict without floor run — SEAL issued but F1-F13 absent
shadow_defense.pattern_P4: Identity forgery — arifOS signature but mismatched session_id
shadow_defense.pattern_P5: Narrative laundering — conclusion contradicts Tier 01 data but SEAL issued

tools.name: arifos_arifos_init
tools.description: Boot identity, constitutional state, issue session_id. Stage 000 anchor.

tools.name: arifos_arifos_memory
tools.description: Governed retrieval and ingestion of episodic and semantic memory via Stage 444.

tools.name: arifos_arifos_vault
tools.description: Declare vault namespace for session. Establishes Merkle chain context.

tools.name: arifos_arifos_kernel
tools.description: Core decision kernel — constitutional logic engine. Omega gate computation.

tools.name: arifos_arifos_gateway
tools.description: Orthogonality gate — Omega cross-domain integrity check. Omega >= 0.95 unlocks Stage 777.
tools.note: Gateway Omega gate not yet formally wired to threshold

tools.name: arifos_arifos_judge
tools.description: Constitutional judgment engine — issues SEAL/HOLD/SABAR/VOID. Final verdict gate.

tools.name: wealth_wealth_check_floors
tools.description: Economic floor enforcement — F6 Peace² gate. Blocks if Peace² < 0.70.

tools.name: geox_arifos_check_hold
tools.description: Physical/geological hold enforcement. Issues geological HOLD on Ω < 0.95.

tools.name: arifos_arifos_ops
tools.description: Operational state management. Git, filesystem, fetch, memory, time substrate controls.

tools.name: arifos_arifos_sense
tools.description: Primary environmental sensing — first reality contact. OBS/DER/INT epistemic labeling.

tools.name: wealth_ingest_fetch
tools.description: Fetch live economic and financial data streams.

tools.name: wealth_ingest_snapshot
tools.description: Point-in-time market snapshot. Captures economic state at query moment.

tools.name: wealth_ingest_sources
tools.description: Register and validate data source registry. Source authority chain.

tools.name: wealth_ingest_health
tools.description: Data source health and reliability check. Flags stale or unreliable sources.

tools.name: wealth_ingest_vintage
tools.description: Temporal data vintage validation — how old is this data? Issues HOLD on stale data.

tools.name: wealth_ingest_reconcile
tools.description: Cross-source reconciliation — resolve conflicts between economic data sources.

tools.name: geox_well_load_bundle
tools.description: Load well data package into session context. LAS/PDF/dlis ingestion.

tools.name: geox_seismic_load_line
tools.description: Load 2D seismic line. SEGY/SGD format support.

tools.name: geox_earth3d_load_volume
tools.description: Load 3D seismic volume. Petrel/Geoeast/Warden format support.

tools.name: geox_map_get_context_summary
tools.description: Spatial map context acquisition. Static map, GIS context.

tools.name: geox_map_georeference
tools.description: Georeferencing and spatial anchoring. CRS transformation.

tools.name: geox_list_skills
tools.description: Enumerate available geological skills in the GEOX organ.

tools.name: geox_skill_metadata
tools.description: Retrieve geological skill metadata. Capability discovery.

tools.name: geox_skill_dependencies
tools.description: Resolve skill dependency graph. Ensures prerequisite skills are available.

tools.name: geox_well_qc_logs
tools.description: Quality control well log data. Flag anomalous curves, depth shifts, Environmental corrections.

tools.name: geox_well_compute_petrophysics
tools.description: Compute porosity, Sw, Vsh, NTG — the rock truth. Physics-first computation.

tools.name: geox_well_digitize_log
tools.description: Digitize analogue log curves. R24/Minitab to continuous curve.

tools.name: geox_section_interpret_strata
tools.description: Stratigraphic interpretation — layer sequence. Cross-section building.

tools.name: geox_earth3d_interpret_horizons
tools.description: 3D horizon picking and interpretation. Geocellular model construction.

tools.description: Structural geometry modeling. Fault framework, fold geometry.

tools.name: geox_time4d_verify_timing
tools.description: 4D temporal change verification. Geochronology constraints.

tools.name: geox_attribute_audit
tools.description: Seismic attribute audit. RMS amplitude, coherency, curvature consistency check.

tools.name: geox_seismic_vision_review
tools.description: Visual seismic intelligence review. GEOX vision analysis of seismic displays.

tools.name: geox_cross_summarize_evidence
tools.description: Cross-domain evidence synthesis. Well + seismic + geological synthesis.

tools.name: geox_prospect_evaluate
tools.description: Prospect volumetric evaluation — STOIIP/GIIP.物理-first volumetrics.

tools.description: Geological risk computation — POS/POF. Earth-domain risk scoring.

tools.description: Constitutional empathy and ethical risk — Stage 666. Adversarial critique and risk scoring.

tools.name: entropy_spike_detector

tools.name: arifos_arifos_forge
tools.description: Primary execution forge — Stage 777. Motor cortex fires only after SEAL.

tools.description: Portfolio state post-execution. Snapshot after capital action.
